title: capsella angermannica
intro: Capsella angermannica, also known as shepherd's purse, is a flowering plant in the Brassicaceae family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and expectorant properties. The health benefits of shepherd's purse include reducing inflammation, relieving coughs and colds, and aiding in digestion. Shepherd's purse can be prepared as a tea by infusing the leaves and flowers in hot water, or as a tincture by combining the plant with a solvent such as ethanol or glycerin.
